calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor, Norah J
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Sherry O'Brien, Esq. appeared by Court Call for Petitioner(s): Joshua Jermaine, as guardian ad litem for Norah J., a minor Claimant.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $21,912.78
Reimbursement of litigation costs and expenses total $2348.88
A net balance of $65738.34 to be deposited into Merrill Lynch's custodial account 6x811xxxx of Merrill Edge, no withdrawals may be made except as provided by further court order.
Order signed by in open court.
